name: ZRCN Inc.
summary: Overview We are a Silicon Valley-based company operating in Northern California since 1977. Leveraging our proprietary sensor-based technology across a mix of global markets, including commercial and residential buildings, government infrastructure and building information modeling, we are focused on creating new, technical solutions for global applications in the areas of home and workplace safety, project efficiency, and structural data analysis.
